product_overview: RoutinMate is a mobile app for building personal routines and tracking daily progress. It also helps users find one accountability mate, chat with them, and view each other’s routines and profiles.
core_goals: Track routine completion and rest days
Register, log in, and complete first-time onboarding
Discover and match with another user for accountability
Chat with an active mate through direct messages
View and update personal profile details and photos
Review a mate’s profile, routines, and photos after matching

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Users can register with email and password, verify their account with an email OTP, or log in to access the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Select the registration tab -> Enter display name, email, and password -> Submit the registration form -> Enter the 6-digit email OTP -> See the onboarding screen
Navigate to /auth -> Select the login tab -> Enter email and password -> Submit the login form -> See the main tabs

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: New users complete profile setup by providing basic personal details and interests before entering the main app.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Select a gender -> Enter bio and personal information -> Select interests -> Complete onboarding -> See the main tabs

features.name: Routine Management
features.description: Users can view routines, mark them complete or incomplete, create new routines, edit existing routines, and delete routines from the home experience.
user_flows: Navigate to /(tabs)/ -> View routines in list or calendar view -> Mark a routine complete or incomplete -> See the routine status update

Navigate to /(tabs)/ -> Open routine creation -> Enter routine name -> Choose frequency -> Set notification time -> Select target days when needed -> Save the routine -> See the new routine in the list
Navigate to /(tabs)/ -> Open a routine for quick editing -> Update the routine name or time -> Save the changes -> See the updated routine details
Navigate to /(tabs)/ -> Swipe or long-press a routine -> Delete the routine -> See it removed from the list

features.name: Rest Day Toggle
features.description: Users can mark today as a rest day so routine tracking is skipped for that day.
user_flows: Navigate to /(tabs)/ -> Toggle today as a rest day -> Confirm the rest day state -> See routine tracking skipped for the day

features.name: Match Discovery
features.description: Users can browse other people, send match requests, and respond to incoming requests to form one active accountability match.
user_flows: Navigate to /(tabs)/mate -> Browse discovery cards -> Send a match request to a user -> See the request state update
Navigate to /(tabs)/mate -> View incoming match requests -> Accept a request -> See the match established
Navigate to /(tabs)/mate -> View incoming match requests -> Reject a request -> See the request removed or declined

features.name: Direct Messages
features.description: Matched users can view message history and exchange text messages in the DM tab.
user_flows: Navigate to /(tabs)/dm -> View the message history with the matched mate -> Type a text message -> Send the message -> See the message appear in the conversation
Navigate to /(tabs)/dm -> Open the DM tab without an active match -> See the locked placeholder screen

features.name: User Profile
features.description: Users can view and edit their profile information, manage profile photos, review stats, toggle Pro status, and log out.
user_flows: Navigate to /(tabs)/profile -> View profile stats and personal details -> Edit bio or other profile information -> Save changes -> See the updated profile
Navigate to /(tabs)/profile -> Upload a profile photo -> Add a photo to the gallery -> Pin a photo or delete a photo -> See the gallery update
Navigate to /(tabs)/profile -> Toggle Pro status -> See the account status change
Navigate to /(tabs)/profile -> Log out -> Return to the unauthenticated entry flow

features.name: Mate Profile View
features.description: Users can open a matched mate’s profile to review their bio, stats, routines, and photos, and can unmatch from that screen.
user_flows: Navigate to /mate-profile -> View the mate’s bio, stats, routines, and photo gallery -> Review their account details
Navigate to /mate-profile -> Choose to unmatch -> Confirm the action -> See the match removed

tech_stack.ui_library: React Native core components, React Native Reanimated, Expo Vector Icons

routes.description: Splash/redirect screen - routes to welcome or tabs based on auth state
Welcome landing screen with login/register entry points
Authentication screen with login and register tabs, OTP email verification
New user onboarding flow to set up profile (interests, gender, etc.)
Home screen showing daily routines with list and calendar views
Create new routine screen with frequency, time, and day selection
Match discovery screen to find and send match requests to other users
Direct messages screen for chatting with matched mate
User profile screen with bio, photos, stats, and settings
View matched mate's profile with their routines and photos

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register with email, password, and display name; verify with OTP code
user_interactions: Get redirected to onboarding on success

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with existing email and password credentials
user_interactions: Get redirected to home tabs on success

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: New user profile setup with interests, gender, and personal details
user_interactions: Complete onboarding to reach main app

features.name: Routine Management
features.description: Create, view, edit, delete, and complete daily/weekly/monthly routines
user_interactions: View routines in list or calendar view
Tap routine to mark as complete/incomplete
Swipe or long-press routine to delete
Tap edit icon to quick-edit routine name or time
Tap "+" button to navigate to create routine screen
Select target days for weekly routines

features.name: Rest Day Toggle
features.description: Mark today as a rest day to skip routine completion
user_interactions: Tap rest day button on home screen

features.name: Match Discovery
features.description: Browse other users and send match requests to find a routine mate
user_interactions: Tap send match request button on a user card
Accept or reject a match request

features.name: Direct Messages
features.description: Chat with matched mate (only available after a match is made)
user_interactions: Access DM tab (blocked if no match)

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and edit personal profile including bio, photos, and account settings
user_interactions: View profile stats (achievement score, routines count)

features.name: Mate Profile View
features.description: View matched mate's profile, routines, and photos

known_limitations.issue: DM tab is guarded — shows a lock screen if user has no active match
known_limitations.impact: Users without a match cannot access the DM feature

known_limitations.issue: Zustand store uses AsyncStorage which is not SSR-compatible; custom webStorage adapter added as workaround
known_limitations.impact: Web build required a custom localStorage-based adapter to prevent SSR crash

known_limitations.issue: Real-time messaging uses polling via loadUserData rather than Supabase Realtime subscriptions
known_limitations.impact: Messages are not pushed in real-time; user must refresh to see new messages
